name: chad-tools-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugins for dev workflows, shell scripting, GitHub API patterns, VM management, and more

plugins.name: chad-tools
plugins.description: Multi-agent code review, AI slop removal, worktree management, and dev workflow automation

plugins.name: exe-dev
plugins.description: exe.dev VM management — SSH CLI, HTTP proxy, sharing, and Shelley integration

plugins.name: gh-recipes
plugins.description: Recipes for gh CLI operations that don't have built-in subcommands (milestones, branch protection, webhooks, etc.)

plugins.name: fzf-power
plugins.description: Teaches Claude to use fzf's full power — preview windows, keybindings, theming, and advanced patterns instead of bare | fzf

plugins.name: zsh-craft
plugins.description: Teaches Claude to write idiomatic zsh — modules, builtins, and parameter expansion instead of bash-in-disguise

plugins.name: claude-craft
plugins.description: Claude Code CLI knowledge, plugin management guardrails, and automation recommendations
